recentTweets.text:
I got back from a Congressional fact-finding mission to Cuba. What I saw was a humanitarian crisis, the result of more than six decades of failed US policy. 

We need to spread the word. https://t.co/FTWe4VL0GX

With enough political will, we can end the HIV epidemic.
This National #HIVPreventionDay, we’re recommitting ourselves to expanding access to HIV prevention and ensuring everyone has the opportunity to benefit from lifesaving prevention tools.

Here’s the sad thing about Trump’s speech last night: he just can’t get over the fact that he lost an election nearly six years ago. 

The SAVE America Act would make it harder for Americans to register and vote, especially women whose current legal name does not match their

Today, we commemorate the life of our friend, colleague, and civil rights champion John Lewis. 
We will continue to make good trouble and fight to pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act in his memory. https://t.co/ZsTNei62ln

Breaking: Intelligence officials now estimate Trump’s war with Iran has cost us $100 BILLION. 

That money could have covered Medicaid for more than 27 million children. Instead of endless wars, we should be investing in making life better for the American people. https://t.co/LN9X6mam49

Yes, correct. Thank you @BreitbartNews for your help in spreading the word! 

According to MIT's Living Wage Calculator, a single adult needs $30/hour or more to meet basic living expenses in many major U.S. cities.

Wisconsin's bipartisan Elections Commission found probable cause that Elon Musk broke the law by offering $1 million checks to registered voters right before the 2025 Supreme Court race. 

Wisconsin's bribery law bans paying people to vote or influence how they vote, whether or
I agree!

It's 2026. The federal tipped minimum wage is still $2.13/hour, unchanged since 1991. That’s the same year the Soviet Union collapsed and Nirvana released Smells Like Teen Spirit.

I spoke with @SaruJayaraman of @OneFairWage about what we can do to fix this.

House Republicans unveiled a new budget bill that provides up to $73 BILLION in additional war spending. We need to lower costs and improve the lives of working people, not give another massive handout to wealthy defense contractors.
The cost of gas is way too high and is costing Americans their hard-earned paychecks! Trump needs to end his war with Iran.

Big win! The Trump administration just dropped a major effort that would force hospitals to end gender-affirming care for youth. 

Patients, parents, and doctors should be the only ones making medical decisions, not politicians. 

https://t.co/sCo1PPDd8I
True

Today, I questioned Supreme Court Justices Elena Kagan and Amy Coney Barrett at a House Appropriations hearing about the exponential rise of “shadow docket” decisions. 

These backdoor rulings let the Court make important decisions quickly, often without the full public process https://t.co/586K3HIbBQ

I asked Trump's billionaire head of the Small Business Administration a simple question: "who pays tariffs?" Her response was an insulting denial of reality. 

As a former small business owner of 37 years, this is personal to me. Watch here: https://t.co/K7jR8SHb4S

Yet another horrific ICE shooting. This time in Maine. Joan Sebastian Guerrero was fatally shot, driving to work, with his 3-year-old daughter in the car. 

The is the second ICE shooting in less than a week. ICE is making our communities LESS safe and must be held accountable. https://t.co/BKMdJLuhTL

Trump and Republicans in Congress have failed to prioritize the needs of everyday Americans. 

We’re fighting back in Congress, in courts, and alongside our communities because your tax dollars should be used to actually make your life better, not on Trump’s vanity projects or

My former colleague from Wisconsin, @RepRibble, co-wrote an excellent op-ed on the dangers of the SAVE Act. Reid is a Republican, and even he agrees this bill goes too far.

It's already illegal for non-citizens to vote. The SAVE Act would instead make it harder for eligible

We cannot allow this blatant corruption to be normalized. When we're in the majority, we will investigate it and expose the full truth. 
https://t.co/o0w8R2YEJf https://t.co/QkqcDIwAqY
Huge news - a judge ruled Trump's $1.776 slush fund is nullified!

Trump abandoned the ceasefire with Iran → Gas prices are up → Your costs will continue to increase. 

We need to end the war with Iran!
REMINDER: Medicare for All would save 68,000 lives and $450 billion a year.

Whether you’re a Democrat, Republican, or Independent, we can all agree that billionaires and big corporations buying up politicians like they’re just another vacation home is simply not right. 

We need to end Citizens United.

Last night, Trump fired the remaining Democratic members of the bipartisan Election Assistance Commission. 

This is yet another step in his plan to meddle in the November election, and we will do everything we can to fight this blatant power grab. 
https://t.co/ecbf9zv4LS

The Trump administration is threatening to withhold federal anti-terrorism funds to states who don’t capitulate to their demands, using Americans’ safety as a bargaining chip. 

Every Republican official who claims to care about public safety should condemn this immediately.

Great town hall last night in Racine, WI! We’re going to keep organizing and fighting alongside the people who deserve a government that works for them, not just the wealthy and well-connected. https://t.co/piPuexh7NF
Karoline Leavitt thinks that young people concerned about rising prices are being “raised with silver spoons in their mouths.” https://t.co/QHCeAL481d

If the last 18 months have shown us anything, it’s that Trump and Congressional Republicans don’t give a damn about regular people. 

Costs have skyrocketed, yet Republican politicians’ top priority was handing billionaires another massive tax break. 

We’re committed to putting

HUGE congratulations to Barrio Dance Factory from my district on their incredible performance on @AGT last night. 

They are moving on to the next round, and I'll be rooting for them along the way! https://t.co/BANdXn1M4g

This week’s podcast episode is about corruption. I spoke with Donald Sherman of @CREWcrew about how Trump has made billions over the last 18 months through foreign deals, stock trades, and crypto. 

We also covered the urgent need for ethics rules on the Supreme Court and the

While JD Vance is in Milwaukee today for a trip that includes a $10,000 per couple fundraiser, I’ll be in Racine, WI with fellow progressives doing a free town hall open to the public. I hope to see you there. https://t.co/nyuW2dBEiY

After launching new strikes on Iran last night, Trump is now declaring the ceasefire “over.” He’s dragging the US deeper into a war Americans do not want.

Congress passed bipartisan war powers resolutions for this exact reason. Trump must stop the escalation now.
Former Education Secretary Cardona talks about the years-long attacks on public education. Listen to the full episode here: https://t.co/OtBT50TkUG https://t.co/UAkg6r0S9O
Town hall tomorrow! Looking forward to seeing you Racine, WI to chat about what’s on your mind. https://t.co/nyuW2dBEiY
Dr. Oz just doesn't get it. If someone stole $100 from you and later handed back 20 bucks, why would you thank them?
Lowering costs is a top priority for Democrats. We need a future everyone can afford. https://t.co/TNVXPDM8aa
Join me for a town hall with Progress for the People this Wednesday in Racine, Wisconsin! RSVP here: https://t.co/Xq1D1gCqd5 https://t.co/3YVomheZ4j

91 years ago, the National Labor Relations Act guaranteed American workers the right to organize, bargain collectively, and stand up to their employers without fear of retaliation. 
As Co-Chair of the @Labor_Caucus, I will continue to fight for these rights!

Two and a half centuries ago, a new nation was born. The United States of America. Our founders made a bet that was radical for its time – that people could govern themselves instead of bowing to a king. It hasn’t always been easy. 

But that's what self-government is about:
Republicans' “Big Beautiful Bill” passed the House one year ago today. Basically, everyday people are paying more so that people like Elon Musk can get an extra vacation. https://t.co/57U0JBYadA
Another weak jobs report for June. Trump and Republican politicians promised to grow the economy. They failed. Time for change. https://t.co/RiNduhC0PR https://t.co/zgFeDRhO0y

136 years ago today, Congress said “no” to the railroad and steel barons who ran monopolies with the Sherman Antitrust Act. 
Even then, we knew that consolidation was dangerous and competition is good for our economy. 
We need that same courage now to stand up to the robber-baron https://t.co/Y7ORTVPQUb

The House of Representatives was sent home early again this week by the Republican majority. I’m sitting here without a tie, and I’ll thank them for that. But we should be working for the American people. https://t.co/zBDulcxmHG
The GOP is just completely out of touch. A year ago, they passed the biggest tax cut for billionaires. Today, they're bragging about eating lobster and steak. What a joke.

🩺 Rips healthcare coverage away from at least 11 million Americans
🍲 Slashes food assistance by $187 billion for 4

Hard to miss the giant tarp out front, put up so that people can't see Trump's name removed. https://t.co/YhAxTMEema

The Department of Education is facing attacks like never before. So I spoke with someone who ran it.
Former Secretary Miguel Cardona (@teachcardona) joins the podcast to talk about what's really at stake for students and teachers. Watch here:

https://t.co/twoUwioQc0
Trump has made more than $2 billion since returning to the White House, mostly from foreign investments, crypto, and stock trading. It’s never been about draining the swamp. He IS the swamp.

Today is the 60th anniversary of the start of Medicare. It remains one of the most popular government services, and proves that America can deliver healthcare that works. For six decades, it's covered seniors. Now, it’s time to cover everyone!
